description_long: This house features a simple rectangular layout with a flat roof and a minimalist, modern design. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray material, and the structure includes several blue-tinted windows arranged in a linear pattern on the front facade. The interior appears to be divided into multiple rooms, with visible tiled flooring in some sections and open spaces that suggest living and utility areas. The main entryway is centrally located on the front side, flanked by windows, and there is a secondary, larger opening on one side that could serve as a garage or additional entrance. The overall design is functional and unadorned, with clean lines and a focus on practicality. The house is likely constructed from concrete or similar materials, providing durability and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a light gray exterior, blue-tinted windows, and a simple, rectangular layout. The design is minimalist, with multiple rooms and tiled interior flooring visible through large openings.
description_view_0: Front view showing three blue-tinted windows and a central entry door, with a larger opening on the left side.
description_view_1: Rear view revealing tiled interior flooring and two open rooms, with no windows or doors on this side.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a solid wall, three windows, and a small white section suggesting a utility area.
description_view_3: Interior-focused view showing tiled floors, open rooms, and blue-tinted windows on the far wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Central single door with minimal detailing, flanked by windows and a larger side opening, no porch or decorative elements.
